director.name: 约翰·阿姆斯特朗 John Armstrong

introduction: It takes Picture Holland 15 minutes to let the viewer experience what the Netherlands is all about: a country of contrasts. From quaint old harbours, where history seems trapped, and wide vistas where only birds dare to tread, to innovative architecture and fervent activity, the audience finds itself sailing on the ever-present wind over patchwork farmlands and the silver rivers which the old Dutch Masters once caught on canvas.
